contexts.context: …: I propose fn:trunk(). It’s a <mark>noun</mark> and has lots of good connotations.
MSM: I like names that are <mark>noun</mark>-phrases, not verb phrases.
…function. We should use a name that’s more <mark>noun</mark>-like, perhaps $target.
…defining it is that we don’t have a collective <mark>noun</mark> for maps and arrays. It would be convenient…
